name: demucs
description: Demucs is an audio source separator created by Facebook Research.

audio.description: Upload the file to be processed here.
audio.title: Audio

clip_mode.description: Choose the strategy for avoiding clipping. Rescale will rescale entire signal if necessary or clamp will allow hard clipping.
clip_mode.title: clip_mode

jobs.description: Choose the number of parallel jobs to use for separation.
jobs.title: Jobs

model.description: Choose the demucs audio that proccesses your audio. The readme has more information on what to choose.
model.title: model

mp3_bitrate.description: Choose the bitrate for the MP3 output. Higher is better quality but larger file size. If MP3 is not selected as the output type, this has no effect.
mp3_bitrate.title: Mp3 Bitrate

mp3_preset.description: Choose the preset for the MP3 output. Higher is faster but worse quality. If MP3 is not selected as the output type, this has no effect.
mp3_preset.title: mp3_preset

output_format.description: Choose the audio format you would like the result to be returned in.
output_format.title: output_format

overlap.description: Choose the amount of overlap between prediction windows.
overlap.title: Overlap

segment.description: Choose the segment length to use for separation.
segment.title: Segment

shifts.description: Choose the amount random shifts for equivariant stabilization. This performs multiple predictions with random shifts of the input and averages them, which makes it x times slower.
shifts.title: Shifts

split.description: Choose whether or not the audio should be split into chunks.
split.title: Split

stem.description: If you just want to isolate one stem, you can choose it here.
stem.title: stem

wav_format.description: Choose format for the WAV output. If WAV is not selected as the output type, this has no effect.
wav_format.title: wav_format
